data.title: Draganfly Provides Corporate Update Highlighting Strong Defense Momentum, Industry Tailwinds, and Robust Balance Sheet
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on March 26, 2026, a notable drone technology company, Draganfly Inc. (NASDAQ: DPRO; CSE: DPRO; FSE: 3U8A), shared a corporate update. They emphasized ongoing operational advancements, favorable industry trends, and solid financial standing.

data.title: VivoPower Receives Nasdaq Approval of Ticker “TEMB” for Planned Tembo Listing at a Targeted Valuation of $838 Million
data.description: The approval of the ticker symbol represents a significant milestone in the regulatory process for the listing of the business merger between Tembo e-LV, a subsidiary of VivoPower, and Cactus Acquisition Corporation I (CCTS). This step is crucial in finalizing the combination of the two entities and moving forward with their strategic plans. The approved ticker symbol will help investors track the progress and performance of the newly merged entity in the market. This development comes at a time when both companies are aiming to capitalize on the growing opportunities in the electric vehicle sector.

data.title: Amplify Expands Leadership Roster with New President and Chief Revenue Officer
data.description: Amplify Technology, LLC, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, has recently appointed Jason Rowley as President and Kimberly Hill as Chief Revenue Officer. The company focuses on advisor technology.

data.title: Virchow Raises $4 Million to Advance Biopsy Specimen Stewardship and Expand Access to Precision Oncology
data.description: A company based in La Jolla, California, known as Virchow Medical, has recently secured $4 million in seed financing. This funding round was spearheaded by Cerberus Ventures. The primary goal of this financial boost is to progress in the field of biopsy specimen stewardship and enhance the availability of precision oncology services.

data.title: Jump Launches AI Associate, an Intelligent Agent Bringing Action to Its AI OS for Advisors
data.description: Salt Lake City - Jump, a company specializing in AI solutions for advisors, has introduced AI Associate, a new tool designed to assist advisors in performing tasks throughout their workflows. This launch aims to enhance productivity and efficiency for advisors utilizing AI technology in their practices.

data.title: Learn how to transform a chicken egg into a drug factory with this innovative technique.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.5% in 2021, a significant upward revision from the previous estimate of 3.6%. This growth is driven by strong recoveries in major economies, with the U.S. economy expected to expand by 6.5% and China by 8.5%. However, disparities exist among countries, with developing nations facing slower growth rates due to limited access to vaccines and fiscal support. The report also warned about the impact of inflation on consumer prices and the growing debt levels in many countries. Despite these challenges, the global economy is on track for a faster recovery than initially predicted.

data.title: SoundHound AI Named Leader in The Aragon Research Globe™ for Agent Platforms 2026
data.description: A technology company's innovative platform is being recognized for its comprehensive AI agent capabilities across various channels, sophisticated conversational AI features, and enterprise automation solutions. The technology stands out for its ability to cater to a wide range of industries, showcasing advanced AI functionalities.

data.title: SARA BLAKELY'S SNEEX BUILDS ON BREAKOUT SUCCESS WITH THE BALLERINA HY-HEEL -- A NEW SILHOUETTE IN THE HYBRID HIGH HEEL CATEGORY
data.description: Atlanta, 26th March 2026 - SNEEX, a luxury footwear company established by innovator Sara Blakely, is introducing a new shoe style called The Ballerina. This follows a successful initial year for the brand. The Ballerina features the brand's unique Hy-Heel technology. This innovation focuses on combining fashion and comfort in footwear. Sara Blakely, the trailblazing founder behind SNEEX, aims to redefine beauty standards in the industry.

data.title: BAILOR GROUP Marks Five Years of Intentional Growth, Identifying the Patterns That Determine Whether Businesses Scale or Stall
data.description: In Huntsville, Alabama, as of March 26, 2026, data shows that nearly half, specifically about 50%, of businesses do not survive beyond their initial five years. Factors such as market dynamics and funding limitations are commonly attributed to these failures. However, CEO Sonya Bailor, a growth strategist, challenges this notion with her firm, emphasizing an alternative perspective on the leading causes behind the closure of a significant number of businesses.

data.title: G2 Introduces Innovations to Help Software Companies Build Trust and Win in the AI Answer Economy
data.description: In Chicago on March 26, 2026, G2, the leading data source for B2B software worldwide, unveiled enhanced identity verification and Managed Certification Program (MCP) features. These advancements bolster vendor prominence and expansion, empowering buyers to make quicker and more assured purchasing choices. This development will significantly impact G2’s market presence and is a crucial step towards facilitating seamless transactions in the B2B software landscape.

data.title: SHINE and C-Ray Therapeutics Establish Strategic Partnership for Exclusive Distribution of Non-Carrier-Added Lu-177 in Mainland China
data.description: A collaboration has been established between SHINE Technologies, LLC and C-Ray Therapeutics, aiming to provide consistent access to a crucial cancer therapy isotope in Chengdu, one of the largest and rapidly expanding oncology markets globally. The partnership, announced on March 26, 2026, will facilitate the supply of the isotope to cater to the high demand in the market. This strategic agreement is expected to benefit both companies and improve the availability of the therapy, enhancing cancer treatment options. This development signifies a significant step in addressing the healthcare needs in the region and underlines the commitment to advancing oncology solutions.

data.title: Naturepedic Brings Back Early Leadership Member as Chief Operating Officer to Support Next Phase of Growth
data.description: Chagrin Falls, Ohio - Naturepedic, a top provider of GOTS certified organic and EWG Verified® mattresses, is experiencing significant growth in response to a 28% year-over-year increase in demand for their products. The company is broadening its leadership team, enhancing technology systems, and expanding its retail presence. This expansion aims to meet the rising consumer interest in certified organic sleep solutions.

data.title: Conntour Transforms Video Intelligence with Limitless AI Search, Launches with $7M Seed Round
data.description: A cutting-edge AI video analytics platform has been launched, providing a breakthrough in security operations. This platform allows unrestricted natural language search across any camera network and operates entirely on-premises. It enhances security measures by enabling real-time responses to active threats and expediting post-incident investigations. This innovation is set to revolutionize the industry with its capabilities, offering significant advantages.
